Whispering_Towers.description: Massive towers storing the Archive of runes and knowledge
features: bridges of glass and silver rope

The_Archive.description: A labyrinth of runes storing every story, letter, and conversation in the city
The_Archive.purpose: Source of language for the Construct
The_Archive.mechanics: Each rune represents a fragment of language

Wildlands.description: Untamed lands outside the city representing chaotic uncurated data

Circle_of_Rivers.description: Waterways surrounding the city that metaphorically store memories

Old_Hills.description: Ruins from the Rulebound Age where rigid rule systems once failed

magic_system.runes: Fragments of language that store meaning
magic_system.resonance: Connections between runes representing relationships between ideas
magic_system.attention_spells: Focus mechanisms that select relevant runes
magic_system.memory_circles: Limits on how much information the Construct can remember at once
magic_system.amplification: Increasing runes and towers makes the Construct more powerful
